headerDisplay: Weather-aware Homebridge irrigation platform driving Philips Hue smart sockets. The custom UI is the recommended way to configure this plugin — the schema below is a fallback for users who prefer to edit `config.json` directly.
footerDisplay: See the [README](https://github.com/SanderBaron/homebridge-weather-smart-irrigation#readme) for setup and troubleshooting.

name.title: Name
name.description: Display name shown in the Homebridge log and Apple Home.

bridgeIp.title: Bridge IP
bridgeIp.description: Local IPv4 address of the Philips Hue Bridge. Use the custom UI to discover and pair.

apiKey.title: API key
apiKey.description: Hue API key (username) issued when you press the bridge link button and pair. Set by the pairing flow in the custom UI.

healthCheckSec.title: Health-check interval (sec)
healthCheckSec.description: How often to confirm the bridge is reachable. Valves are closed in plugin state when health checks fail.

name.title: Location name
name.description: Display only — does not affect weather lookups.

enabled.title: Pump present
enabled.description: Toggle when this setup uses a central pump. Leave off for line-pressure setups.

hueLightId.title: Pump Hue outlet
hueLightId.description: Hue light id controlling the pump socket.

preRunSec.title: Pre-run (sec)
preRunSec.description: Seconds the pump runs before any valve opens, to build pressure.

postRunSec.title: Post-run (sec)
postRunSec.description: Seconds the pump keeps running after the last valve closes, to bleed pressure.

zoneIds.title: Zones served by this pump
zoneIds.description: Zone ids this pump runs for. Empty array means "every zone".

zones.title: Zones
zones.description: Watering zones. Each zone maps a Hue smart socket to a logical area.

id.title: Zone id
id.description: Stable identifier. Used in schedule entries and persistent state.

name.title: Name
name.description: Display name shown in Apple Home.

type.title: Type
type.description: Used only to seed smart defaults in the UI; blocking logic does not branch on type.

hueLightId.title: Hue outlet
hueLightId.description: Hue light id that powers this zone's valve.

concurrencyGroup.title: Concurrency group
concurrencyGroup.description: Zones with the same group can water simultaneously. Empty means standalone (always alone).

blockedOctants.title: Blocked octants
blockedOctants.description: Wind directions (where the wind blows FROM) that block this zone.

minimumWindSpeedMs.title: Minimum wind speed (m/s)
minimumWindSpeedMs.description: Stored in m/s. The UI handles km/h / mph / knots / Beaufort conversion.

past24hThresholdMm.title: Past 24h threshold (mm)
past24hThresholdMm.description: Skip watering when total rainfall in the last 24 hours meets or exceeds this.

next12hThresholdMm.title: Forecast 12h threshold (mm)
next12hThresholdMm.description: Skip watering when forecast rainfall in the next 12 hours meets or exceeds this.

schedule.title: Schedule
schedule.description: Watering entries. The "Activate Schedule" switch in Apple Home controls whether these fire.

sources.title: Sources
sources.description: Open-Meteo and Buienradar are free; OpenWeatherMap requires an API key.

openWeatherMapApiKey.title: OpenWeatherMap API key
openWeatherMapApiKey.description: Required only if openweathermap is in sources.

consensusStrategy.title: Consensus strategy
consensusStrategy.description: How the per-source votes combine into a block / don't-block decision.

cacheMinutes.title: Cache (minutes)
cacheMinutes.description: How long to memoise weather data between API calls.

autoResetMinutes.title: Auto-reset (minutes)
autoResetMinutes.description: How long a manual wind/rain override switch stays on before snapping back.

windUnit.title: Wind unit (display)
windUnit.description: Display unit for wind speeds in the UI and logs. Internal storage and calculations always use m/s.

logLevel.title: Log level
logLevel.description: Use debug while troubleshooting; info for normal operation.
